auth.description: Authentication and session management services, including OAuth redirects, token refresh, account linking, identity provider integration, and authorization middleware.

firmware_update.description: Over-the-air firmware update orchestration, manifest validation, binary download, hash verification, staged rollout controls, and device update state tracking.

bluetooth.description: Bluetooth discovery, pairing, reconnection, device capability exchange, connection health monitoring, and mobile-to-device transport behavior.

networking.description: Network client behavior, DNS resolution, retry policy, TLS handshakes, connectivity diagnostics, proxy handling, and API gateway communication.

release_pipeline.description: Build, packaging, release manifest generation, artifact publishing, version promotion, CI/CD automation, and production deployment gates.
